prompts: Cinematic shot in a Japanese fantasy RPG guild warehouse, Sora Emberlane (feminine scout in cropped travel jacket, messenger straps) and Sora Dawncrest (feminine mage in layered blue robes) floating in mid-air due to a zero-gravity arcane hazard. Sora Emberlane reaches out to grasp a glowing, drifting arcane container while Sora Dawncrest begins weaving a stabilizing spell with glowing blue sigils. High-quality fantasy aesthetic, fluid motion, no text, no watermark.

Continuous shot in the same Japanese fantasy guild warehouse, Sora Emberlane anchors her boots to a wooden crate and hands the glowing arcane container to Sora Dawncrest. Sora Dawncrest catches the container, chanting as she seals it with a bright blue magical barrier, causing the floating debris to gently settle back to the ground. Consistent characters and lighting, no text, no watermark.
